atom.definition: qaybta ugu yar ee curiye oo weli ah curiyahaas

grundamne.definition: walax ka kooban hal nooc oo atam ah

atomkarna.definition: qaybta dhexe ee atamka halka protonnada iyo neutronnadu ku jiraan

proton.definition: qayb si togan u korontoobay oo ku jirta xudunta

neutron.definition: qayb aan koronto lahayn oo ku jirta xudunta

elektron.definition: qayb si taban u korontoobay oo ku wareegsan xudunta

masstal.definition: wadarta protonnada iyo neutronnada ee xudunta

elektronskal.definition: aagga ku wareegsan xudunta ee elektaroonnadu ku jiraan

valenselektron.definition: elektaroon ku jira qolofka ugu dibadda

periodiska_systemet.definition: jadwal lagu habeeyey curiyeyaasha iyadoo loo eegayo lambarka atamka iyo sifooyinka

period.definition: saf jiif ah oo ku jira jadwalka periodiga

grupp.definition: tiir toosan oo ku jira jadwalka periodiga

metall.definition: walax inta badan gudbisa kulaylka iyo korontada lana qaabayn karo

icke_metall.definition: walax aan lahayn sifooyinka caadiga ah ee biraha

alkalimetall.definition: curiye ku jira kooxda 1 oo si fudud u lumiya hal elektaroon

halogen.definition: curiye ku jira kooxda 17 oo si fudud u qaata hal elektaroon

adelgas.definition: curiye ku jira kooxda 18 oo leh qolof dibadeed oo buuxa

kemisk_bindning.definition: wax isku haya atamyada ama ionnada

jonbindning.definition: isku-xidh u dhexeeya ionno togan iyo ionno taban

kovalent_bindning.definition: isku-xidh ay atamyadu ku wadaagaan labo elektaroon

metallbindning.definition: isku-xidh ku jira biraha halka elektaroonnadu u dhaqaaqi karaan inta u dhexaysa atamyada

salt.definition: walax ka kooban ionno togan iyo ionno taban

formelenhet.definition: saamiga ugu yar ee tiro dhan ee ionnada ku jira cusbo

laddningsbalans.definition: marka wadarta korontooyinka togan iyo taban ay noqoto eber

natriumjon.definition: ion togan oo loo qoro Na+

kloridjon.definition: ion taban oo loo qoro Cl-

oxidjon.definition: ion taban oo loo qoro O2-

magnesiumjon.definition: ion togan oo loo qoro Mg2+

aluminiumjon.definition: ion togan oo loo qoro Al3+

fallning.definition: walax adag oo samaysanta marka ionnada ku jira xal ay falgalaan

silvernitrat.definition: walax loo isticmaalo in lagu ogaado qaar ka mid ah ionnada halide

bariumjon.definition: ion togan oo loo isticmaali karo in lagu ogaado ionnada sulfate

salpetersyra.definition: asiidh loo isticmaalo baaritaanka ionnada si loo kala saaro falcelinno qaarkood

jodidjon.definition: ion taban oo loo qoro I-

sulfatjon.definition: ion taban oo loo qoro SO4 2-

karbonatjon.definition: ion taban oo loo qoro CO3 2-
